scope: B8.0 information-contract canary RESULT red-team (workflow wtnmjmp1d, 2 lenses, opus-4-8). Verifies: B7.1-killer control genuine (not null-repair); prior_only over-alert = collider not bug; violations refused + borderline/lowvar no-false-alert; POS weak-not-powerless; provenance/isolation clean; honest MIXED verdict. Development-only, NOT confirmatory, NOT validation, NO tag.
overall: accounting/provenance/isolation CLEAN (PASS, 0 defects); numbers reproduce exactly; verdict genuinely MIXED. Science lens raised NO artifact defect but sharpened two caveats the pre-red-team framing underweighted (1 HIGH). Artifact is clean -> packaged; framing corrected to carry the caveats.

accounting_isolation.accounting: 12 worlds x 50 = 600 records; 600/600 unique task_ids; cohorts 0..49/world; world_index/world_class correct; 6-state distribution sums to 50/world (only NO_ACTIONABLE/ALERT/CONTRACT_INVALID populated; INSUFFICIENT/SAMPLER_INVALID/NEED_MORE all 0). Every alert/state/contract_valid count + every median (auc/support/p_meanT/p_stud) matches b8_stage0_tables.json. 0 worker errors. All 12 sha256 sidecars match.
accounting_isolation.provenance: every seed == 400e6 + world_index*1e6 + cohort (range [400000000, 411000049]); all 600 unique; scanned 126 prior jsonl (10780 distinct seeds across B5 30/40e6, P3 50-70e6, R1/strong-cov 80-120e6, B6 200e6, B7 300e6) -> B8 intersection = 0 (no seed reuse). 1200 finite p-values all lie on k/201 (confirms n_boot=200).
accounting_isolation.isolation: check_contract(Z,C,G,Block,seed) takes NO Y and runs before any T (contract-first refusal); exact within-(block,class) permutation null, NO fitted Y|Z or C|Z propensity; alert depends only on p_t,p_z,estimability,eligibility (NO oracle/router/observed_T-threshold/B7-witness); records carry no such fields; reconstructing alert from recorded p-values = 0/600 mismatches; Y enters only as resample_C_exact class-margin key.
accounting_isolation.no_pooling: contract-valid vs contract-violating reported separately with kind-specific screen; recomputed screen matches (contract_nulls_le3=False, violation_alerts_le3=True, pos_power=True, pos_strong=False); self-reported verdict MIXED.

science.numbers_real: recomputed all counts from 12 raw shards (sha256-intact); B8_CONCEPT_ALERT derives correctly from stored p-values + n_eligible>=20 + estimable (ninv<=40) gates; 0 mismatches vs both b8_alert flag and from-scratch rederivation.
science.key_result_genuine_but_a_split: CONTRACT_NULL_cov_plus_prior controlled at ALERT 1/50 = 2% vs observational B7.1 24/300 = 8%. Mechanism sound: under a valid within-block randomization contract the covariate is drawn INDEPENDENTLY of C, so the exact block-stratified null captures it. This is NOT 'a better null repairs the same broken data' -- B8 SPLITS the B7.1 killer into (i) the randomized version (controlled 1/50) and (ii) the actually-confounded version VIOLATION_cov_plus_prior (AUC~0.78) which B8 REFUSES 50/50. Fixes the structural failure via requiring+exploiting randomization, not via null estimation.
science.prior_only_is_collider_not_bug: CONTRACT_NULL_prior_only over-alert 5/50 = 10% is the DESIGN-PREDICTED approximate-exactness limitation. fix_class_margins=True stratifies the exact permutation by (Block,Y); Y depends on C (logit shift +/-0.62) AND on Z (via p0) -> Y is a post-treatment collider; conditioning on it leaves residual within-(block,Y) C-Z dependence, left-shifting observed T (median p_meanT 0.187 vs 0.475 balanced). Appears on prior_only(5) not cov_plus_prior(1) because cov_plus_prior's balanced 2-sigma covariate inflates the studentized-null denominator (studentized-gate passes 2 vs 6), damping the small collider signal on the AND-partner gate. CP95 = [3.3, 21.8]%; correctly flagged by screen (contract_nulls_le3=false).
science.violations_refused: cov_confound / cov_plus_prior / no_within_block_rand all 50/50 REFUSED (the true B7.1 observational structure is refused). borderline (AUC 0.586, 46 pass contract) and lowvar (17 pass) slip through tau=0.60 yet ALERT 0/50 -- exact null + rank-3 T robust to a mild C~Z confound.
science.pos_power_weak: POS_boundary 4/50, POS_boundary_plus_prior 5/50. Studentized gate is the bottleneck (mean-T gate passes 12, both gates only 4). Safe-but-weak, not powerless.

serious_issues.summary: At the boundary effect size, genuine POS power (POS_boundary 4/50 = 8%) does NOT exceed the worst null inflation (prior_only 5/50 = 10%); Clopper-Pearson CIs fully overlap ([2.2,19.2]% vs [3.3,21.8]%). The test currently CANNOT separate a weak genuine concept from the prior-collider artifact. 'Safe-but-weak / power genuine' is true only with this asterisk: at this effect size + n_eligible=30, power sits at/below the collider-inflated null floor, not above it.
serious_issues.disposition: DISCLOSED, not fixed in B8.0 (no in-place tuning per protocol). Motivates B8.1 = tighten prior-exactness (lower the collider floor) AND raise audit/label power budget (raise POS) so POS separates from the floor. Until then POS and null-floor are NOT separable.

secondary_issues.summary: Per-world screen NOT uniformly met: CONTRACT_NULL_prior_only 5/50 = 10% > pre-declared 3/50 = 6% (all 5 at the p-boundary, p_stud 0.0199-0.0249). Empirical footprint of the disclosed non-exactness (fix_class_margins conditions the 'exact' null on a Y collider). The exact null is only APPROXIMATELY exact for prior-bearing worlds. Do NOT read B8 as a clean type-I result.

The 1/50-vs-24/300 headline is directionally right but a reframing, not like-for-like: B8's cov_plus_prior has the covariate drawn INDEPENDENTLY of C (balanced by construction); B7.1's killer was confounded. 1/50 CP95=[0.1,10.6]% OVERLAPS B7.1's 8%. The argument rests on the PATTERN (all well-behaved nulls balanced/cov_balanced/cov_plus_prior/random all <=1/50) + 50/50 refusal of the confounded versions -- NOT on this single cell. n=50, single base seed 400000000.

NO tested world combines a QUIET confound that PASSES tau (like borderline AUC 0.586) WITH a C->Y prior/label effect. The slip-through worlds (borderline, lowvar) both have Y=draw(p0) -- no C->Y effect -- so 'ALERT 0 on slip-through' partly reflects there being no concept to detect, not proven robustness in the genuinely dangerous cell. The only world carrying confound+prior together (VIOLATION_cov_plus_prior) is loud (AUC~0.78) and refused. The dangerous 'quiet-confound + C->Y-effect' cell is UNTESTED -> a B8.1 stress-design requirement. lowvar slip-through is also thin (0/17, CP95u 19.5%).

The contract gate fits a LogisticRegression C~Z (block-adjusted top-8-PC AUC vs tau=0.60) at realeeg_b8.py:143 -- a fitted C|Z discriminator INSIDE the decision path. Within spec: it is the DECLARED contract-validity predictability gate run before T and does NOT weight or construct the null (null is exact permutation), so 'no fitted propensity in the null' holds. Validator is linear-only (low-var/nonlinear blind spot; lowvar caught only 33/50).

Declared scope caveats confirmed: emulator (Lee2019 SM16 geometry) is NOT validation; validator tests only linear top-8-PC C~Z predictability; TAU_CONTRACT_AUC=0.60 fixed; n=50/world -> wide CIs on every rate; single base seed. Development-only, not confirmatory, no tag -- consistent with labeling.

verdict: B8.0 = information-contract DIRECTION VALIDATED ON EMULATOR (MIXED). Artifact CLEAN (accounting/provenance/isolation PASS). Requiring a KNOWN randomization contract + exact null CONTROLS the mixed covariate+prior cell that structurally broke the observational line (B3->B7) and REFUSES confounded data -- via requiring+exploiting randomization, not null estimation. Disclosed limitations: (a) HIGH -- POS power does not yet exceed the prior-collider null floor (cannot separate weak concept from artifact at this effect size/budget); (b) prior_only approx-exactness 5/50 (Y-collider under fix_class_margins); (c) stress-design gap (quiet-confound+C->Y untested); (d) emulator not real randomized-audit data. NOT a clean pass, NOT a failure. NO tag. NEXT (reviewer decision): B8.1 = class-balanced randomization contract (lower collider floor) + audit/label power budget (raise POS above floor), or real randomized-audit data.
